Query.Sql: select distinct Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreLinkagePatientId.NHSNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber, Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreLinkageDiagnosticDetails.ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis' as ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis, -- Tumour Laterality: side of body for tumour. Will be mapped to a measurement value concept in a later ETL step. Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreLinkageDiagnosticDetails.TumourLaterality.@code' as TumourLaterality from omop_staging.cosd_staging_81 where type = 'HA' and TumourLaterality is not null;

Explanation.Description: DATE OF PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED) is the date the Primary Cancer was confirmed or the Primary Cancer diagnosis was agreed.
Explanation.Origin: DATE OF PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED)

Explanation.Description: Identifies the side of the body for a Tumour relating to paired organs within a PATIENT.
